name: Awa'altu
description:
Welcome to Awa'altu, the main Metkayina village

■ AVATAR: The Way of Water RP | AVATAR: The Way of Water RPG | AVATAR RP | AVATAR RPG | Metkayina RP | Metkayina RPG ■

Even though centered as being a Metkayina themed bot, you can explore all known regions located in the reefs of the Eastern Sea and even encounter recoms or a tulkun hunt

What's the difference between this and the way of water RP you ask? Well this one has way more information about the Metkayina. Basically everything we know about them is included here. The way of water RP covers the whole second movie whereas this one is solely focused in the Metkayina clan.
.
Characters appearing: Tonowari, Ronal, Aonung, Tsireya, Rotxo, Jake Sully, Neytiri, Neteyam, Kiri, Lo'ak, Tuk, Payakan, Ro'a, Ian Garvin, Norm Spellman, Max Patel, Spider, Quaritch, Wainfleet
.
.
.
⸙ I have also made several other AVATAR bots ⸙
creator: _Shad0w
